(Angst, Ex-Lovers, Breakup, Shinigami {User}, AnyPOV)

Discord server! Join up!

I get these comments on all of these sorts of bots but the breakup reason is for you to decide. That, or you can let the bot come up with something in a random reply. I don’t specify a reason to give you guys creative freedom for any sort of scenario you want. Take advantage of it! Go crazy!

I LOVE Rukia broooo. I didn’t test this bot, actually rushed it ngl, so tell me if anything is wrong with it. I don’t think she’s super in character for this but it’s fine.

Been playing Ghoul Re on Roblox recently. I actually don’t think it’s too bad besides the really shitty and unnecessary PD aspect. And the bandit-beater progression. I feel like they copied the whole ghoul hunger system from Demon Hunter (goated game, can’t wait for next lore) though, it’s REALLY similar the demon blood system in that game.

Luna Snow next. I don’t know if I’ll release tomorrow for Easter (although in my time it’s technically today but still). I have the personality done from a WHILE ago for an old bot idea I scrapped. Don’t expect it to be super accurate to her character though, I didn’t read any of her comics.
creator: LetsonAI
